summary: Testing of security training platform features: Login without 2FA flow, CMS Tiles CRUD, Executive Training with 9 modules, and Upload functionality. All 24 tests passed (19 backend + 9 frontend).
passed_tests: Backend: test_login_endpoint_exists - PASS
Backend: test_login_returns_token_without_2fa_code - PASS
Backend: test_login_response_contains_2fa_flags - PASS (Returns requires_2fa_verification and two_factor_enabled)
Backend: test_get_tiles_returns_default_tiles - PASS (Returns 4 default tiles: blog, news, videos, about)
Backend: test_get_tiles_admin_endpoint - PASS
Backend: test_create_tile - PASS (Can create custom tiles)
Backend: test_update_tile - PASS (Can update tile description/icon)
Backend: test_toggle_publish_tile - PASS (Can toggle publish status)
Backend: test_delete_custom_tile - PASS (Can delete non-system tiles)
Backend: test_cannot_delete_system_tile - PASS (System tiles protected)
Backend: test_create_tile_requires_admin - PASS
Backend: test_available_modules_returns_9_modules - PASS
Backend: test_all_expected_modules_present - PASS (phishing, social_engineering, password_security, data_protection, ransomware, insider_threat, mobile_security, remote_work, bec)
Backend: test_module_structure - PASS (Each module has key, title, subtitle, slide_count)
Backend: test_generate_each_module - PASS (Returns valid PPTX)
Backend: test_get_uploaded_presentations - PASS
Backend: test_upload_requires_super_admin - PASS (403 for non-admin)
Backend: test_upload_requires_file - PASS (400 if no file)
Backend: test_health_check - PASS
Frontend: Login page loads without 2FA field - PASS
Frontend: Can login with admin credentials - PASS
Frontend: Login form shows forgot password link - PASS
Frontend: Can toggle to inquiry form - PASS
Frontend: Executive Training shows 9 modules - PASS
Frontend: All 9 module titles visible - PASS
Frontend: Slide count badges displayed - PASS
Frontend: Can download PPTX - PASS
Frontend: Upload button visible for admin - PASS

features_verified.login_without_2fa: PASS - Login endpoint /api/auth/login accepts email+password, returns token with requires_2fa_verification=false and two_factor_enabled=false for users without 2FA
features_verified.cms_tiles_crud: PASS - GET /api/cms-tiles returns 4 default tiles, POST/PATCH/DELETE work for custom tiles, system tiles protected from deletion
features_verified.executive_training_9_modules: PASS - GET /api/executive-training/available-modules returns exactly 9 unique modules with slide counts
features_verified.executive_training_upload: PASS - GET /api/executive-training/uploaded returns list, POST requires super_admin role and file
features_verified.pptx_download: PASS - GET /api/executive-training/generate/{module_key} returns valid PPTX file

seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working. Login without 2FA tested - returns requires_2fa_verification=false when user has no 2FA setup. CMS Tiles API supports full CRUD with 4 default system tiles. Executive Training now returns 9 modules: phishing, social_engineering, password_security, data_protection, ransomware, insider_threat, mobile_security, remote_work, bec. Upload endpoint requires super_admin role. Rate limiting is active on login - wait between repeated logins.
api_endpoints_verified: POST /api/auth/login - Returns token with 2FA status flags
GET /api/cms-tiles/admin - Returns all tiles including unpublished (admin only)
DELETE /api/cms-tiles/{tile_id} - Delete custom tile (system tiles protected)
